EB corbos Linux Network Determinism
Metric: Round-Trip Latency (RTL)
========================================

Probes:       2000
Protocol:     UDP
Period:       1 ms
Msg size:     64 B
Flood rate:   0 Mbps
Echo timeout: 10 ms

Sending HELLO to 10.0.1.1:5000 (protocol=UDP)...
HELLO_ACK received — protocol=UDP
Starting ping-echo loop (2000 probes at 1 ms period)...
